name: toolbox
title: Toolbox
description: A trades & local-services theme: workwear navy and hi-vis yellow, condensed signage headings, job-sheet mono prices. The signature is the sticky call-now bar on mobile — one tap from problem to phone call.

tokens.--font-display: headings and the site title (condensed, signage-like)
tokens.--font-mono: prices, dates, labels, and code (the job-sheet voice)
tokens.--text-m: base body size, legible at arm's length
tokens.--text-xl: large headings and the CTA heading
tokens.--color-hivis: the hi-vis marking color: call bar, CTA button, quote marks
tokens.--color-on-hivis: text placed on the hi-vis color
tokens.--color-stripe: the dark segments of the hazard stripe
tokens.--radius: corner rounding for cards and buttons
tokens.--tap-target: minimum touch height for buttons and links
